zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox於1345年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素時，他的父親Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox25歲，母親Margaret MacArkill26歲。他於1373年3月30日與Helen Campbell在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年5月25日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年80歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox于1345年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素时，他的父亲Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox25岁，母亲Margaret MacArkill26岁。他于1373年3月30日与Helen Campbell在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年5月25日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年80岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox was born in 1345, in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox, was 25 and his mother, Margaret MacArkill, was 26. He married Helen Campbell on 30 March 1373, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 25 May 1425, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox est né en 1345, à Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacArkill, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Helen Campbell le 30 mars 1373, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1425, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox 1345 in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox 25 und seine Mutter Margaret MacArkill 26. Er hat am 30. März 1373 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Helen Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1425 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox è nato il nel 1345 nel Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret MacArkill, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Helen Campbell il 30 marzo 1373, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1425, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennoxが1345年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアボーロチ カストルで生まれた時，父Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennoxは25歳，母Margaret MacArkillは26歳であった。1373年3月30日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでHelen Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年5月25日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで80歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox(이)가 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 바럭 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret MacArkill(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1373년 3월 30일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Helen Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 5월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox nasceu em 1345, em Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret MacArkill, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Campbell em 30 de março de 1373, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1425, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox родился в 1345 г. в местности баллоч кастл, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacArkill, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Campbell 30 марта 1373 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 25 мая 1425 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox nació en 1345, en Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret MacArkill, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Helen Campbell el 30 de marzo de 1373, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1425, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
